title: HyperDirector Render Report
description: Records the lint, preview, and render results for a single video generation run. Written to output/render-report.md (human) and stored as JSON for programmatic access.

task_id.description: Unique identifier for this render run. Format: kebab-cased project title + ISO timestamp. Example: saas-demo-20260507T1200Z.

template.description: Template used for this render run. Must match brief.template.

aspect_ratio.description: Canvas aspect ratio of the rendered video.

duration_seconds.description: Target total duration in seconds. Taken from brief.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this render report was created.

lint_result.description: Output of the structural lint check on the generated HTML (index.html / final.mp4).

passed.description: True if all lint checks passed (zero blocking issues).

issues.description: List of lint findings. Empty array means clean.

severity.description: error = blocking, must fix; warning = degraded quality; info = advisory.

code.description: Machine-readable lint rule code. Example: DURATION_MISMATCH, MISSING_CTA, CONTRAST_FAIL.

scene_id.description: Scene affected, if applicable. Format: scene_01.

auto_fixable.description: Whether this issue was or can be automatically fixed.

preview_result.description: Results from headless browser preview check of index.html / preview.html.

passed.description: True if preview rendered without JS errors and all scenes displayed.

screenshot_path.description: Relative path to preview screenshot, if captured.

console_errors.description: JavaScript console errors encountered during headless preview.

scenes_verified.description: Number of scenes that rendered correctly in preview.

render_result.description: Outcome of the final MP4 render step.

status.description: success = final.mp4 produced; partial = rendered with known degradation; failed = render aborted; skipped = HTML-only output.

output_path.description: Relative path to the rendered MP4 file. Example: output/final.mp4.

actual_duration_seconds.description: Actual duration of the rendered MP4, measured after encoding.

file_size_bytes.description: File size of the rendered MP4 in bytes.

encoder.description: Encoder used. Example: puppeteer+ffmpeg, ScreenToGif, manual.

fixes_applied.description: List of auto-fixes applied during the generate-fix-verify loop.

description.description: Human-readable description of what was changed and why.

scene_id.description: Scene affected by this fix, if applicable.

iteration.description: Fix loop iteration number (1-indexed) in which this fix was applied.

output_files.description: List of files produced in the output directory for this run.

path.description: Relative path from workspace root. Example: output/final.mp4.

role.description: Semantic role of this output file.

size_bytes.description: File size in bytes at time of report generation.

known_issues.description: Acknowledged limitations or degradations in this render that were not auto-fixed. Surfaced in render-report.md for human review.

description.description: Plain-language description of the known issue.

severity.description: Impact level of this known issue on output quality.

workaround.description: Suggested manual workaround or next step for the user.
